name: Funding-Cost-Efficiency (FCE)
description: Measures the 'Return-on-Allocated-Capital' (ROAC) by comparing 'Operational-Spend' against 'Verified-Value-Creation' (Revenue, Assets, or Efficiency-Gains).
goalMapping: Enforces 'Fiscal-Optimization' and prevents 'Sub-Optimal-Capital-Deployment' across the 10-agent array.
